title: Technical Server Modpack
description: This modpack provides plugins aimed at technical servers.
body:
This modpack provides plugins aimed at technical servers that don't want to change the vanilla mechanics. It requires Fabric as the server because it does not modify the game mechanics. The mods included are:

- Simple Voice Chat
- Carpet
    - Carpet Extra
    - Carpet TIS Addition
- Worldedit

Credit:

WorldEdit: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/worldedit
